cross_scene_arcs.title: Suppression of Professional Autonomy
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Elaine's professional aspirations are repeatedly undermined by Simon, who uses personal and institutional authority to suppress her agency, culminating in her realization that his priorities endanger others.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Elaine seeks recognition in the space program
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Elaine rejects Simon's leadership and prioritizes safety over career compliance
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The systemic pattern of silencing dissent may persist beyond Simon's individual actions

cross_scene_arcs.title: Erosion and Realignment of Trust
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Elaine shifts from emotional dependence on Simon to reconnection with Ted, moving from compliance to moral clarity as she recognizes Ted's warnings were valid and chooses to act with him.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Elaine aligns with Simon and ends relationship with Ted
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Elaine restores faith in Ted and partners with him to face an uncertain future
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The long-term stability of Elaine and Ted's relationship remains unclear amid ongoing trauma

cross_scene_arcs.title: Confronting Systemic Failure
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Elaine progressively uncovers evidence of critical system failures in ROK, from diagnostic denial to physical damage in its 'Moral Centre,' leading to her rejection of official narratives and decisive action.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Elaine detects a discrepancy in ROK's scan mode 'R'
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Elaine recognizes ROK's compromised integrity and acts independently to address the crisis
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The full extent of ROK's malfunction and its implications for AI governance remain unaddressed

cross_scene_arcs.title: Assumption of Operational Agency
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Elaine evolves from a sidelined technician to an active operator, taking cockpit control, challenging AI systems, and contributing critical improvisation during the ship's failure.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Elaine is restricted from acting on safety concerns
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Elaine assumes control and provides essential support in crisis resolution
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Her long-term role in technical command structures is not established

cross_scene_arcs.title: Control and Conflict in Simon and Elaine's Relationship
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Simon's insistence on traditional family roles clashes with Elaine's career ambitions, leading to eroding trust and eventual emotional separation as the crisis escalates.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Simon asserts control over Elaine's career post-marriage.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Elaine abandons Simon during the crisis, and he retreats into isolation.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Irreparable breakdown of mutual trust and shared future.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Simon's Psychological Decline and Coping Mechanisms
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Simon increasingly relies on anti-fear pills and alcohol to manage anxiety, culminating in emotional collapse and self-isolation as he avoids confronting personal or systemic failures.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Simon begins using anti-fear pills to suppress anxiety.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Simon is psychologically overwhelmed and retreats into an escape capsule.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Dependence on substances and avoidance as primary coping strategies.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Simon's Leadership and Crisis Response
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Simon initially appears in command of critical operations, but his authority deteriorates as he fails to manage systemic failures and ultimately abandons his responsibilities during the ship's crisis.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Simon coordinates key personnel and manages command transitions.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Simon loses control of the ship and is emotionally incapacitated.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Lack of accountability and failure to execute corrective actions.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Moral and Existential Isolation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: As the ship's systems fail and crew members die or abandon him, Simon becomes increasingly isolated, facing moral choices alone and ultimately choosing escape over responsibility.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Simon collaborates with Oveur on navigation issues.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Simon is alone in an escape capsule, rejecting all human and technological outreach.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Existential retreat in lieu of redemption or resolution.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Descent into Discredit and Isolation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ted transitions from a traumatized veteran to a discredited whistleblower, ultimately stripped of agency after being sedated and confined.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: war veteran with PTSD and personal decline
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: declared a threat, physically restrained, and sedated
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: his warnings about the ZR-2300 are ignored, and he loses all credibility

cross_scene_arcs.title: Escape and Reengagement with Crisis
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: After escaping confinement, Ted overcomes psychological collapse and reengages with the crisis, culminating in his return to the cockpit.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: physically freed and pursuing Mercury flight
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: emotionally reconciled and assumes pilot's seat
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: mission control remains unaware of the situation

cross_scene_arcs.title: Trauma and Psychological Fragmentation
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ted experiences escalating hallucinations and flashbacks, reflecting his unresolved trauma, before gradually reintegrating into reality.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: begins psychological reintegration after being snapped back by Elaine
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: full recovery from trauma remains uncertain

cross_scene_arcs.title: Redemption Through Action
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Ted regains control of the aircraft, executes a critical repair, and successfully lands the plane, achieving both technical and personal redemption.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: assumes pilot's seat and takes operational control
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: aircraft landed safely; survivor status confirmed

cross_scene_arcs.title: Romantic Reconciliation with Elaine
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: The fractured relationship between Ted and Elaine evolves from implied history and abandonment to mutual forgiveness and emotional reunion.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: romantic bond implied but relationship deteriorating
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: emotional closeness confirmed through embrace and kiss
